description: SMBs cannot collect USD digitally without losing 3-8% to intermediaries -- Zelle limits, P2P fees, and no merchant infrastructure force informal, fragmented cash flows
Informal Venezuelan and LATAM retailers have zero real-time stock visibility -- inventory tracked in paper notebooks or memory, causing chronic stockouts and over-purchasing
LATAM SMBs have no digital marketing skills or infrastructure -- customer acquisition is 100% word-of-mouth, limiting growth ceiling and making businesses fragile when referral networks stall
Venezuelan e-commerce operates on near-zero institutional trust -- buyers fear scams (estafas), sellers fear non-payment, and there is no escrow or reputation infrastructure for informal transactions
current_workarounds: Using personal referrals as trust proxy

description: Venezuelan and LATAM SMBs mixing USDT, bolivares, and USD cash have zero consolidated cash flow view -- they cannot distinguish profit from working capital, leading to phantom-profit spending and liquidity crises

WhatsApp is the primary commerce channel for Venezuelan SMBs but has no order management, catalog versioning, or payment tracking -- operators manually handle 50-200 orders/day via chat threads with no system of record

Venezuelan micro-business accounting is done entirely via WhatsApp messages, voice notes, and phone photos -- there is no bookkeeping trail, making tax compliance impossible and loan applications get rejected
current_workarounds: Photo of invoice sent to WhatsApp group
Accountant who reconstructs records from memory
Excel once a year for SENIAT

description: LATAM B2B payments across borders (e.g. Colombia-Venezuela, Mexico-Colombia supplier payments) take 5-15 business days via SWIFT and cost 3-5% -- stablecoins are known but unintegrated into B2B workflows

Venezuelan operators earning USDT or crypto have no clear SENIAT guidance -- they do not know if they owe taxes in bolivares or USD, what counts as taxable income, or how to declare stablecoin holdings without triggering audits
current_workarounds: Ask WhatsApp groups for informal advice
Pay an accountant who also does not know
Declare zero and hope for no audit
